common.errorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

landing.headline: What do Iranians want? Help us find out.
landing.subtitle: Submit your concerns, AI organizes without editorializing, community votes, everything is transparent.
landing.description: Submit concerns and prioritize policy clusters through approval voting.
landing.successMessage: Verification link sent! Check your email.
landing.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landing.step1Description: Tell us what matters to you, in your own words.
landing.step2Description: Your concern is grouped with similar ones — no human editing.
landing.step3Description: Everyone gets an equal voice in deciding what matters most.
landing.step4Description: Every step is logged in a tamper-proof chain anyone can verify.
landing.trustDescription: Every step is logged. Nothing is hidden.

signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a verification link
signIn.successMessage: Check your email for the sign-in link.
signIn.errorMessage: Could not send sign-in link. Please try again.

signup.title: Create Your Account
signup.subtitle: Two steps to get started. No passwords, no phone numbers.
signup.emailSentDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to continue to step 2.
signup.emailSentTip: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or try again.
signup.emailError: Could not send verification link. Please try again.
signup.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
signup.whyEmail: Your email is used for verification only. We never share it.
signup.whyTelegram: Telegram lets you submit concerns and vote directly from the app.

verify.nowConnectTelegram: Now connect your Telegram account to start participating.
verify.linkingCodeInstruction: Send this code to our Telegram bot to complete your signup:
verify.errorExpired: This link has expired. Please sign up again to get a new one.
verify.errorInvalid: This link is invalid. Please sign up again.

dashboard.title: My Activity
dashboard.noSubmissions: You haven't submitted any concerns yet.
dashboard.wrongCluster: My submission is in the wrong group

analytics.pageDescription: Citizen submissions are organized by AI into concern groups around shared policy topics. Groups that gain enough community support enter the voting ballot.
analytics.communityVotesDescription: When grouped concerns gain enough community support, they enter the voting ballot. View active voting cycles and results from past votes.
analytics.noVotesYet: No voting cycles have started yet. Concerns that gain enough support will appear here for voting.
analytics.noActiveVotes: No active voting cycle right now. Check back soon.
analytics.archivedConcernsDescription: These concerns have been included in a voting cycle and are no longer accepting new submissions.

events.submissionRejectedPii: Submission rejected: high risk PII detected
events.disputeEscalated: Dispute escalated: primary model overridden by ensemble
events.submissionRejectedNotPolicy: Submission rejected: not a policy proposal

analytics.activeCycleBanner: Voting is open! {count} policies on the ballot.
analytics.submissionNotFoundDescription: This submission could not be found. It may have been removed or the link is invalid.

ops.title: Ops Console
ops.subtitle: Runtime diagnostics and recent system activity
ops.noEventsWithFilters: No events match the current filters.
ops.unavailable: Ops console is disabled or you do not have access.
